description: Multiple incidents show Figma and Okta SSO sessions for external vendor accounts expiring far sooner than the configured policy. Opening a problem record to track the underlying session-timeout misconfiguration and remediation.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Vendor SSO sessions expiring early

description: Recurring reports of web fonts and hero imagery rendering incorrectly on staging and production storefronts after deploys. Opening a problem record to track the image and font pipeline caching issue.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Asset pipeline over-compression and font fallback

description: Several incidents trace back to external vendors lacking the right Box and Confluence scopes on first request. Opening a problem record to standardize the vendor onboarding access template.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Inconsistent vendor access provisioning

description: Marketing analytics dashboards intermittently show duplicate UTM entries and fail to render custom date ranges. Opening a problem record to track the data ingestion and reporting pipeline defect.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Analytics dashboard data quality

description: Vendor VPN profiles drop during sustained large uploads, affecting asset handoffs. Opening a problem record to track the VPN idle-timeout and MTU configuration.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Vendor VPN drops on large uploads

description: Okta MFA push notifications intermittently fail to deliver to vendor accounts, forcing backup-code use. Opening a problem record to track the push-provider routing for external users.
short_description: Root-cause analysis - Okta MFA push delivery for vendors
